svg.title: Data flow — what happens to a citizen message
svg.desc: Step-by-step flow from citizen message through intent classification, query rewriting, RAG retrieval, synthesis, hallucination guard, and final response.
svg.text: A citizen message — step by step

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the platform receive citizen messages?')
g.text: POST /chat — Gateway receives text, user_id, session_id

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is fast-path detection in the gateway?')

g.text: Local Llama 1B — optimises query for RAG retrieval
ChromaDB — semantic + keyword search · chunk re-ranking
Cloud (Groq) or local — grounded in retrieved chunks only

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the hallucination guard check?')
g.text: Validates numbers · dates · jurisdiction against source text

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does knowledge gap logging work?')
g.text: Unanswered queries sent to Dashboard for admin review

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the final response look like?')
g.text: JSON — response text · intent · source attribution

svg.text: Click any step to learn more about that stage
